title: Infosys Launches Topaz Fabric AI Stack for Enterprise IT Services
detailed_summary: Infosys announced the launch of Infosys Topaz Fabric on November 3, 2025. The offering is described as a layered, composable, open and interoperable stack of data infrastructure, models, agents, flows, and AI apps intended to unify and accelerate IT service delivery across enterprise environments. Infosys said the platform supports IT operations, transformation services, quality engineering services, and cybersecurity services, and includes 50+ purpose-built IT operations agents with out-of-the-box integration with 9 enterprise platforms. The launch is strategically relevant because it expands Infosys’s AI-led service delivery capabilities and aims to help enterprises derive value from AI transformation programs while avoiding vendor lock-ins.
